title: RLDA – Site Engineer – 40 Posts

basic_details.job_title: RLDA Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: RLDA Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 40 vacancies across India. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, M.E/M.Tech Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 02-05-2026, and closes on 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through RLDA website, rlda.indianrailways.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Rail Land Development Authority, Ministry of Railways, Govt. of India

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 55% marks (50% for SC/ST candidates)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted via email only to [email protected] and also by post to the RLDA address. Hard copy applications sent without the email will not be considered. The last date for receipt of applications is 22/05/2026. Candidates must fill the Application Form (Annexure-I) in block letters using a blue ball pen and attach all required documents as per the Annexure-II checklist. All documents and the application must be signed by the candidate on each page.
seo_tags: Rail Land Development Authority Site Engineer Recruitment 2026
